mapper.sql: id, student_id, mentor_id, sop_video_object_key, sop_video_file_name, sop_time, status, remark, created_at, updated_at
mapper.insert: insert into student_sop ( student_id, mentor_id, sop_video_object_key, sop_video_file_name, sop_time, status, remark, created_at, updated_at ) values ( #{studentId}, #{mentorId}, #{sopVideoObjectKey}, #{sopVideoFileName}, #{sopTime}, #{status}, #{remark}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt} )
mapper.select: select from student_sop where student_id = #{studentId} and status in ('ASSIGNED', 'COMPLETED') order by id desc limit 1
mapper.update: update student_sop set sop_video_object_key = #{sopVideoObjectKey}, sop_video_file_name = #{sopVideoFileName}, sop_time = #{sopTime}, status = #{status}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} where id = #{id} and status = 'ASSIGNED'
